generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program capturing crane state data from physical gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data from gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Storage and retrieval of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis and validation"
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring system states"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system states for monitoring"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control services for motion planning and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionPlanningInsight, PredictionInsight
]

instance MotionPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Motion planning for optimal control"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction applications for system behavior"
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation ensuring synchronization between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of synchronization between physical and digital models"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for software architecture visualization using context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SystemArchitectureEnabler
]

instance SystemArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance AutomationMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AutomationML for model-driven digital twin engineering"
]

instance AzureCloudPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin hosting"
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using Docker for deployment"
]

instance VirtualizationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtualization technologies for environment setup"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub-hosted repositories for version control and dissemination"
]

    base:desc "MQTT Broker for message queuing and transmission"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application for subscribing to MQTT topics and writing data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dedicated controller for the gantry crane"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment for the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, CraneController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Movement trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application and sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which executes them on the physical hardware. Command formats, validation, authentication, and conflict resolution mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs an ad-hoc architecture utilizing containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment, with components including InfluxDB for time-series data storage, ActiveMQ as a message broker, and Microsoft Azure tools for cloud services. The architecture is visualized using the C4 Model for context and container diagrams, focusing on integration of physical sensors, data pipelines, and digital twin models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between digital twin services (Control Application, Logging Application, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, Dashboard) occurs via MQTT protocol through an MQTT Broker, forming a publish-subscribe network topology. Bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through Microsoft Azure cloud services for data processing and storage, AutomationML for model interoperability, and ActiveMQ message broker for data exchange between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to AutomationML standards for digital twin modeling. The Lab Scale Gantry Crane applies the C4 Model for architecture description, a standardized approach for software architecture visualization. However, broader interoperability standards or certification requirements are not specified."
]
